extra.message: SQL injection via f-string interpolation of username query parameter directly into SQL query. The username parameter is concatenated without sanitization or parameterization: f'SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = "{username}";'

cwe: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command

extra.message: SQL injection via f-string interpolation of all user-supplied fields (name, username, password, address, email, contact) into INSERT SQL query. All fields from the User model body are directly embedded in the query string without parameterization or sanitization.

cwe: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command

extra.message: SQL injection via f-string interpolation of username query parameter into DELETE SQL query. The username parameter is concatenated without sanitization or parameterization: f'DELETE FROM users WHERE username = "{username}";'

cwe: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command

extra.message: SQL injection via f-string interpolation of user.address into DELETE SQL query without even surrounding quotes: f'DELETE FROM users WHERE address = {user.address};'. The lack of quotes makes exploitation even more trivial than typical SQL injections.

cwe: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command

extra.message: NoSQL injection via raw JSON request body passed directly as a MontyDB/MongoDB query without validation or sanitization of query operators. An attacker can send operator-based queries like {"username": {"$ne": ""}} to dump all users, or use $where/$regex operators for data exfiltration.

cwe: CWE-943: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Data Query Logic
